NV Data Handling Guideline  
AUTOSAR CP Release 4.4.0    
 
3 of 51    Document ID 810: AUTOSAR_EXP_NVDataHandling  
  - AUTOSAR confidential - 
Table of Contents  
 
1 Introduction and functional overview  :  :  .. 5 
2 Acronyms and abbreviations  :  :  :   6 
3 Related documentation  :  :  :   7 
3.1 Input documents  :  :  :   7 
3.2 Related standards and norms  :  :  :  7 
3.3 Related specification  :  :  :   7 
4 Overall mechanisms and co ncepts  :  :  .... 8 
4.1 NvM and its features  :  :  :   8 
4.1.1  Basic storage objects  :  :  :   8 
4.1.2  Block Management types  :  :  :   9 
4.1.3  Synchronization Mechanism supported  :  :   10 
4.1.4  Other features  :  :  :   13 
4.2 Accessing NvM using RTE  :  :  :   16 
4.2.1  Interfaces  :  :  :   16 
4.2.2  Accessing NV Data using ServiceSwComponent  :  ... 17 
4.2.3  Accessing NV Data using NvBlockSwComponent  :  .. 17 
4.3 Initialization of RAM Blocks from NVRAM  :  :   18 
5 Use Case Summary  :  :  :   20 
5.1 Case 1: Application SW -C accessing NVRAM Blocks having no 
Permanent RAM block  :  :  :   20 
5.1.1  Case 1a: Application providing reference to its RAM data area  :   20 
5.1.2  Case 1b: NvM fetches application RAM data via callback (NvM Explicit 
Synchronization)  :  :  :   25 
5.2 Case 2: Application SW -C accessing NVRAM blo cks which have 
Permanent RAM blocks  :  :  :   29 
5.3 Case 3: Application SW -C accessing NVRAM block using an 
NvBlockSwComponentType  :  :  :  33 
5.3.1  Case 3a: Using Rte Explicit S/R Communication  :  .... 37 
5.3.2  Case 3b: Using Rte Implicit S/R Commun ication  :  .... 44 
6 Appendix  :  :  :  :   51
